java.awt/RenderingHints/VALUE_ALPHA_INTE.name: VALUE_ALPHA_INTERPOLATION_DEFAULT
java.awt/RenderingHints/VALUE_ALPHA_INTE.description:
Alpha interpolation hint value -- alpha blending algorithms
are chosen by the implementation for a good tradeoff of
performance vs. quality.

info.excerpt:
Alpha interpolation hint value -- alpha blending algorithms
are chosen by the implementation for a good tradeoff of
performance vs. quality.

java.awt/RenderingHints/VALUE_ALPHA_INTE.name: VALUE_ALPHA_INTERPOLATION_QUALITY
java.awt/RenderingHints/VALUE_ALPHA_INTE.description:
Alpha interpolation hint value -- alpha blending algorithms
are chosen with a preference for precision and visual quality.

info.excerpt:
Alpha interpolation hint value -- alpha blending algorithms
are chosen with a preference for precision and visual quality.

java.awt/RenderingHints/VALUE_ALPHA_INTE.name: VALUE_ALPHA_INTERPOLATION_SPEED
java.awt/RenderingHints/VALUE_ALPHA_INTE.description:
Alpha interpolation hint value -- alpha blending algorithms
are chosen with a preference for calculation speed.

info.excerpt:
Alpha interpolation hint value -- alpha blending algorithms
are chosen with a preference for calculation speed.

java.awt/RenderingHints/VALUE_ANTIALIAS_.name: VALUE_ANTIALIAS_DEFAULT
java.awt/RenderingHints/VALUE_ANTIALIAS_.description:
Antialiasing hint value -- rendering is done with a default
antialiasing mode chosen by the implementation.

info.excerpt:
Antialiasing hint value -- rendering is done with a default
antialiasing mode chosen by the implementation.

java.awt/RenderingHints/VALUE_ANTIALIAS_.name: VALUE_ANTIALIAS_OFF
java.awt/RenderingHints/VALUE_ANTIALIAS_.description: Antialiasing hint value -- rendering is done without antialiasing.

info.excerpt: Antialiasing hint value -- rendering is done without antialiasing.

java.awt/RenderingHints/VALUE_ANTIALIAS_.name: VALUE_ANTIALIAS_ON
java.awt/RenderingHints/VALUE_ANTIALIAS_.description: Antialiasing hint value -- rendering is done with antialiasing.

info.excerpt: Antialiasing hint value -- rendering is done with antialiasing.

java.awt/RenderingHints/VALUE_COLOR_REND.name: VALUE_COLOR_RENDER_DEFAULT
java.awt/RenderingHints/VALUE_COLOR_REND.description:
Color rendering hint value -- perform color conversion
calculations as chosen by the implementation to represent
the best available tradeoff between performance and
accuracy.

info.excerpt:
Color rendering hint value -- perform color conversion
calculations as chosen by the implementation to represent
the best available tradeoff between performance and
accuracy.

java.awt/RenderingHints/VALUE_COLOR_REND.name: VALUE_COLOR_RENDER_QUALITY
java.awt/RenderingHints/VALUE_COLOR_REND.description:
Color rendering hint value -- perform the color conversion
calculations with the highest accuracy and visual quality.

info.excerpt:
Color rendering hint value -- perform the color conversion
calculations with the highest accuracy and visual quality.

java.awt/RenderingHints/VALUE_COLOR_REND.name: VALUE_COLOR_RENDER_SPEED
java.awt/RenderingHints/VALUE_COLOR_REND.description:
Color rendering hint value -- perform the fastest color
conversion to the format of the output device.

info.excerpt:
Color rendering hint value -- perform the fastest color
conversion to the format of the output device.

java.awt/RenderingHints/VALUE_DITHER_DEF.name: VALUE_DITHER_DEFAULT
java.awt/RenderingHints/VALUE_DITHER_DEF.description:
Dithering hint value -- use a default for dithering chosen by
the implementation.

info.excerpt:
Dithering hint value -- use a default for dithering chosen by

java.awt/RenderingHints/VALUE_DITHER_DIS.name: VALUE_DITHER_DISABLE
java.awt/RenderingHints/VALUE_DITHER_DIS.description: Dithering hint value -- do not dither when rendering geometry.

info.excerpt: Dithering hint value -- do not dither when rendering geometry.

java.awt/RenderingHints/VALUE_DITHER_ENA.name: VALUE_DITHER_ENABLE
java.awt/RenderingHints/VALUE_DITHER_ENA.description: Dithering hint value -- dither when rendering geometry, if needed.

java.awt/RenderingHints/VALUE_FRACTIONAL.name: VALUE_FRACTIONALMETRICS_DEFAULT
java.awt/RenderingHints/VALUE_FRACTIONAL.description:
Font fractional metrics hint value -- character glyphs are
positioned with accuracy chosen by the implementation.

info.excerpt:
Font fractional metrics hint value -- character glyphs are
positioned with accuracy chosen by the implementation.

java.awt/RenderingHints/VALUE_FRACTIONAL.name: VALUE_FRACTIONALMETRICS_OFF
java.awt/RenderingHints/VALUE_FRACTIONAL.description:
Font fractional metrics hint value -- character glyphs are
positioned with advance widths rounded to pixel boundaries.

info.excerpt:
Font fractional metrics hint value -- character glyphs are
positioned with advance widths rounded to pixel boundaries.

java.awt/RenderingHints/VALUE_FRACTIONAL.name: VALUE_FRACTIONALMETRICS_ON
java.awt/RenderingHints/VALUE_FRACTIONAL.description:
Font fractional metrics hint value -- character glyphs are
positioned with sub-pixel accuracy.

java.awt/RenderingHints/VALUE_INTERPOLAT.name: VALUE_INTERPOLATION_BICUBIC
java.awt/RenderingHints/VALUE_INTERPOLAT.description:
Interpolation hint value -- the color samples of 9 nearby
integer coordinate samples in the image are interpolated using
a cubic function in bothXandYto produce
a color sample.

info.excerpt:
Interpolation hint value -- the color samples of 9 nearby
integer coordinate samples in the image are interpolated using
a cubic function in bothXandYto produce
a color sample.

java.awt/RenderingHints/VALUE_INTERPOLAT.name: VALUE_INTERPOLATION_BILINEAR
java.awt/RenderingHints/VALUE_INTERPOLAT.description:
Interpolation hint value -- the color samples of the 4 nearest
neighboring integer coordinate samples in the image are
interpolated linearly to produce a color sample.

info.excerpt:
Interpolation hint value -- the color samples of the 4 nearest
neighboring integer coordinate samples in the image are
interpolated linearly to produce a color sample.

java.awt/RenderingHints/VALUE_INTERPOLAT.name: VALUE_INTERPOLATION_NEAREST_NEIGHBOR
java.awt/RenderingHints/VALUE_INTERPOLAT.description:
Interpolation hint value -- the color sample of the nearest
neighboring integer coordinate sample in the image is used.

info.excerpt:
Interpolation hint value -- the color sample of the nearest
neighboring integer coordinate sample in the image is used.

java.awt/RenderingHints/VALUE_RENDER_DEF.name: VALUE_RENDER_DEFAULT

java.awt/RenderingHints/VALUE_RENDER_QUA.name: VALUE_RENDER_QUALITY

info.excerpt:

java.awt/RenderingHints/VALUE_RESOLUTION.description:

java.awt/RenderingHints/VALUE_RESOLUTION.name: VALUE_RESOLUTION_VARIANT_SIZE_FIT
java.awt/RenderingHints/VALUE_RESOLUTION.description:

java.awt/RenderingHints/VALUE_STROKE_DEF.description:

java.awt/RenderingHints/VALUE_STROKE_NOR.name: VALUE_STROKE_NORMALIZE
